input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.2.2
            TITLE: the fuel system location must meet ic.1.2 and f.9

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.2.2: The Fuel System location must meet IC.1.2 and F.9
IC.5.2.2 The Fuel System location must meet IC.1.2 and F.9

final_answer: The Fuel System location must meet IC.1.2 and F.9
